titles.title: For Your Name Is Holy (I Enter the Holy of Holies)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I enter the holy of holies, I enter through the blood of the Lamb, I enter to worship You only, I enter to honor I am.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, I worship You, I worship You, Lord, I worship You, I worship You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For your name is holy, Holy Lord, For your name is holy, Holy Lord.
